primary_variables.matched_definition: Removal or reduction of nutrients (for example glucose starvation, amino acid withdrawal).
evidence: Long-term oestrogen deprived (LTED) cell lines, which model resistance to endocrine therapy, were cultured in phenol red-free RPMI in the absence of exogenous E2

primary_variables.matched_definition: Base or amino-acid substitution (for example SNV, point mutation, engineered missense).
evidence: we report the first discovery of naturally occurring ESR1 Y537C and ESR1 Y537S mutations in MCF7 and SUM44 ESR1-positive cell lines after acquisition of resistance to long-term-estrogen-deprivation (LTED)
ESR1 mutations were confirmed by Sanger sequencing, RNA sequencing, mass spectrometry, and whole-exome sequencing

analysis by Ion torrent also revealed an ESR1 Y537S heterozygous mutation in SUM44-LTED (VAF 47%)

replicate_hints: Two biological replicates per cell line were used
three biological cross-linked WT and LTED-SUM44 pellets
multiplex_channel_hints: The wt-SUM44 and SUM44-LTED were labeled with the medium and light isotope reagent, respectively

evidence: To reveal differential protein abundances between wt-SUM44 and SUM44-LTED, the peptides were labelled with dimethyl labelling
comparative RIME (rapid immunoprecipitation with tandem mass spectrometry of endogenous proteins) and dimethyl labeling between wt-SUM44 and SUM44-LTED
